name: Sandi's Chocolate Chip Sour Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract, ensuring everything is well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon sugar.
5. Gently fold the dry mixture into the wet mixture until just combined.
6. Pour about half of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the batter.
8. Pour the remaining batter over the chocolate chips.
9. Sprinkle the top with additional cinnamon sugar.
10. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
